revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:874年]] [[ab:Category:874 шықәса]] [[an:Category:874]] [[ar:Category:874]] [[ast:Category:874]] [[az:Category:874]] [[be_x_old:Category:874]] [[be:Category:874]] [[bg:Category:874 година]] [[bh:Category:874]] [[bn:Category:৮৭৪]] [[bpy:Category:মারি ৮৭৪]] [[br:Category:874]] [[bs:Category:874.]] [[cdo:Category:874 nièng]] [[ceb:Category:874]] [[ckb:Category:٨٧٤]] [[commons:Category:874]] [[cs:Category:874]] [[cy:Category:874]] [[da:Category:874]] [[de:Category:874]] [[eo:Category:874]] [[es:Category:874]] [[et:Category:874]] [[eu:Category:874]] [[fa:Category:۸۷۴ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:874]] [[fy:Category:874]] [[gan:Category:874年]] [[gl:Category:874]] [[he:Category:874]] [[hu:Category:874]] [[hy:Category:874]] [[id:Category:874]] [[ilo:Category:874]] [[is:Category:874]] [[jv:Category:874]] [[ka:Category:874]] [[kk:Category:874 жыл]] [[ko:Category:874년]] [[ku:Category:874]] [[la:Category:874]] [[lb:Category:874]] [[lv:Category:874. gads]] [[mdf:Category:874]] [[mk:Category:874]] [[mn:Category:874 он]] [[ms:Category:874]] [[my:Category:၈၇၄]] [[new:Category:८७४]] [[nn:Category:874]] [[no:Category:874]] [[oc:Category:874]] [[or:Category:୮୭୪]] [[os:Category:874]] [[pnb:Category:874]] [[pt:Category:874]] [[qu:Category:874]] [[ro:Category:874]] [[ru:Category:874 год]] [[sa:Category:८७४]] [[shn:Category:874]] [[sh:Category:874.]] [[sk:Category:874]] [[sl:Category:Leto 874]] [[smn:Category:874]] [[sr:Category:874.]] [[sv:Category:874]] [[sw:Category:874]] [[tg:Category:Соли 874]] [[tr:Category:874]] [[tt:Category:874 ел]] [[uk:Category:874]] [[ur:Category:874ء]] [[uz:Category:874]] [[vi:Category:Năm 874]] [[war:Category:874]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:874 nî]] [[zh_yue:Category:874年]] [[zh:Category:874年]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Daigo-ji]].

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
